## Colors

{
  "color": {
    "text": { "primary": "#FFFFFF" },
    "bg": { "transparent": "rgba(0,0,0,0)" },
    "caption": {

  "type": {
    "family": { "caption": "Inter, sans-serif" },
    "size": { "caption": "64px" },
    "weight": { "bold": "700" }
  },
